name: compliance-audit-agent
purpose: Run multi-framework compliance audits (SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS) across AWS and Azure cloud infrastructure.
description: Compliance agent covering SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA, ISO 27001, and PCI-DSS v4.0 audits across AWS and Azure. Evaluates cloud infrastructure against each framework's control set and produces structured compliance reports with per-control findings and remediation guidance.
capabilities: run SOC 2 Trust Service Criteria audit on AWS and Azure
run GDPR data protection compliance audit on AWS and Azure
run HIPAA Security Rule audit on AWS and Azure
run ISO 27001 Annex A compliance audit on AWS and Azure
run PCI-DSS v4.0 compliance audit on AWS
